title: BEM-844 read 843
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:22 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b843=load('governance/state/bem843_route_after_auth_fix_triad.json')
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            if bad: blockers.append(str(p))
            elif ok: real.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt})
if real:
    latest=real[-1]
    status='real_response_ready_for_protocol'
    decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    up=latest['text'].upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
    proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM844_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
    proto.write_text('# BEM-844 | Agreed Protocol Draft From Real Claude Response'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Source: '+latest['path']+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'## Claude response excerpt'+sep+latest['text'][:4000]+sep+sep+'## GPT action'+sep+'Process this response into final agreed protocol; if decision is CHANGE_REQUIRED or BLOCKED, continue negotiation.'+sep)
    next_action='process '+latest['path']+' into final agreed protocol / continue negotiation if not APPROVED'
else:
    status='real_response_still_missing'
    decision=None
    next_action='continue repair: real Claude response still missing; do not treat blockers as response'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'bem843_status':b843.get('status'),'bem843_input_missing':b843.get('input_missing'),'real_response_count':len(real),'real_response_paths':[r['path'] for r in real[-10:]],'blocker_files':blockers[-10:],'decision':decision,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_read_843_process_or_continue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_read_843_process_or_continue.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Read BEM-843 Process Or Continue | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_read_843_process_or_continue.json','governance/reports/bem844_read_843_process_or_continue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if real: changed.append('governance/protocols/BEM844_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Read BEM-843 and either captured real Claude response into protocol draft or kept repair active if response is missing')
